name: The Tinley Beverage Company Inc.
summary: The Tinley Beverage Company Inc. manufactures and sells liquor-inspired, non-alcoholic, and cannabis-infused beverages in the United States. It also offers Tinley Tonic and Tinley 27 line of products through retail locations in California; and online in the United States. The company was formerly known as Quia Resources Inc. and changed its name to The Tinley Beverage Company Inc. in October 2015. The Tinley Beverage Company Inc. was incorporated in 2007 and is based in Toronto, Canada.
